purpose: Defines nested reality maps through which the player gradually learns to orient consciousness from body and home to planet, galaxy and cosmic creation.
core_principle: The same laws repeat through scales: inner structure mirrors outer structure, microcosm mirrors macrocosm, game world bridges into real world.

scales.title: Карта сознания
scales.description: The first map: channels of perception, mind space, incoming and outgoing signal, attention and distortion.

scales.title: Карта тела
scales.description: Body as the first temple: senses, posture, breath, organs of action and perception.

scales.title: Карта души
scales.description: The initiation space of feet, heart, head and cooperation where daily experience becomes light.

scales.title: Карта комнаты
scales.description: The player's immediate physical space, desk, bed, altar, tools and daily environment.

scales.title: Карта дома / квартиры
scales.description: Home as the first Star Temple: directions, rooms, elemental zones, daily rituals and family field.

scales.title: Карта земли / сада
scales.description: The living land around the player: garden, plants, stones, outdoor practice, local spirits of place.

scales.title: Карта города / поселения
scales.description: The player begins to see streets, work, community, service and movement as part of a larger field.

scales.title: Карта страны
scales.description: Cultural field, ancestral memory, sacred geography and larger collective patterns.

scales.title: Карта планеты
scales.description: Planetary Logos, grid of power places, planetary elements and collective awakening.

scales.title: Карта галактики
scales.description: The player learns to relate to star fields, galactic myths and cosmic-scale consciousness.

scales.title: Карта вселенной
scales.description: The universe becomes a playable divine field of cards, laws, lokas, domains and created worlds.

scales.title: Карта мироздания
scales.description: The final creative scale where the player acts as a conscious co-creator of a living game universe.

physical_board_requirements.card_correspondence: Every printed card should correspond to a digital card_id when possible.
